Dashboard Archive: 2026-03-25 Home
About This Dashboard
What It Does
Short-term momentum ranker scoring 700+ tickers on returns (1d to 1y), SMA gate (above 30/50/100/200 day), ratio consistency across timeframes, and resilience on bad SPY days. Higher composite scores indicate stronger, more consistent short-term momentum.
Today's Reading
# Market Analysis: momentum-ranker Today's data reveals two extraordinarily strong performers with distinctly different risk profiles. TNGX dominates the rankings at position #1 with a composite score of 96.3, driven by spectacular 1-year returns of 1006.25% and a perfect 4-of-4 ratio consistency passes, though its 1-month return of 52.95% shows extreme concentration of gains in the near term. PARR ranks second with more balanced momentum across timeframes—its 1-year return of 331.17% is substantial but significantly lower than TNGX, and its ratio passes (3 of 4) suggest slightly less consistent acceleration patterns. The key distinction appears in resilience metrics: TNGX's bad_spy_score of 0.38 indicates it holds up remarkably well during market downturns, while PARR's bad_spy_score of 2.62 suggests considerably higher volatility correlation with broader market stress. Both securities clear all four simple moving averages, indicating they are trading well above their major support levels, yet TNGX's 1-day gain of only 2.69% against its massive longer-term backdrop suggests caution about current momentum sustainability.
